channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Pothole in lefthand carriage travelling on Golden Valley, 26th March
item.description:
Lefthand lane a short distance from Arlecourt roundabout, Golden Valley. Approx 100-200 meters from roundabout travelling towards Gloucester
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hatherley Lane, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside The Cot, Green Lane GL34 TX, 26th March
item.description:
Several potholes, bad repairs previously. Ground shaking from vehicles.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Lane, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole in lefthand lane near approach to roundabout, 26th March
item.description:
From memory, about 50m from roundabout junction in lefthand lane travelling along Golden Valley towards Cheltenham.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A40, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothokes, 26th March
item.description:
Significant number of potholes at junction with Reddings park causing a hazard to road users and in particular cyclists
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Reddings Park, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Significant number of potholes, 26th March
item.description:
On the road from the junction with Windermere Road down to Heron Close. The potholes are huge and growing in size daily, cars cannot pass without swinging into the opposite carriageway - an accident waiting to happen! Action needs to be taken urgently
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 213, Hatherley Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light out, 26th March
item.description:
Street light out near to bin
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lobleys Drive, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lampposts out on St Paul’s Road and Dunalley Street, 26th March
item.description:
This was at 7:30 pm. All lampposts on Dunalley Street except the one nearest St Paul’s Road were out. On St Paul’s Road, the 2 lampposts outside 22 and 25 St Paul’s Road were out. Others nearby were on. There had been intermittent mini domestic power cuts in the area earlier that evening, so possibly related
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Dunalley Street, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Temporary speed limit signs, 26th March
item.description:
Temporary speed limit signs still in place before roundabout despite works now having finished as all works vehicles and staff left area. These are located prior to roundabout on A435 coming from Bishops Cleeve towards Cheltenham. Temporary signs are also all the along the A435 past the racecourse.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A435, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Branch down on CBC land from Highways willow, 26th March
item.description:
Resident reports branch down from Highways willow onto CBC land. Post-storm inspection appears necessary. SR CBC
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Honeybourne Drive, Springbank, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole in former repair near petrol station, 26th March
item.description:
Traveling North from Cheltenham. There is a strip of tarmac which is shortly before the petrol station. It is in effect an inverted speed bump - former repair which has sunk. It is worse on the side nearest pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 26th March
item.description:
Limb in tree is resting on a branch, 2/3rds of the way up the tall tree and they are worried it may fall
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 26th March
item.description:
Abrupt level difference around cover. Please ramp off 700x700x20mm Standard TM with temp FW close Stats (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Obstructed Streetlight, 26th March
item.description:
The streetlights are too obscured to read the column numbers. However, the What3Words location of these 2 streetlights are: - lend.limes.tribe - brave.hurls.pull
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Radnor Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 26th March
item.description:
15db Pothole CW 1400x900x50 Road closure with 15db Stats (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Numerous dangerous potholes, 26th March
item.description:
The whole length of Aggs Hill is affected. The road is virtually undrivable.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 26th March
item.description:
Fw abrupt level on verge Fill with topsoil 1600x600x90mm Give and take (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 26th March
item.description:
2 hr Pothole CW 1500x300x100mm 2 way lights Not marked or measured due to location (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 26th March
item.description:
Perm for 2 hr Pothole CW 1500x300x100mm 2 way lights Stats Not marked or measured due to location (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 26th March
item.description:
Cw pothole 500x400x45mm approx 4 way lights (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 26th March
item.description:
Cw pothole 805x405x43mm approx 4 wat lights (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet
